---
title: "Parag Ekbote"
subtitle: "ML Engineer | Open Source Contributor"
---

## About Me

I'm a machine learning engineer passionate about building open-source tools for the AI/ML community. I've contributed to **104+ merged pull requests** across **24+ repositories** including HuggingFace, PyTorch, LinkedIn, Optuna, and more.

My work spans model optimization, documentation improvements, community notebooks, and infrastructure enhancements across the ML ecosystem.

---

## Quick Links

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6}
**🔬 Research & Publications**

[View on Google Scholar →](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=2NmGuDsAAAAJ)

See my publications, citations, and research work.
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
**💻 Open Source**

[View Projects →](projects.qmd)

104+ merged contributions across major ML projects.
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
**🤖 Model Collections**

[HuggingFace](https://huggingface.co/AINovice2005) | [Docker Hub](https://hub.docker.com/u/paragekbote) | [Replicate](https://replicate.com/paragekbote)

Models and deployments for the community.
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
**🔗 Connect**

[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/parag-ekbote/) | [GitHub](https://github.com/ParagEkbote)

Let's collaborate on open-source projects.
:::

:::

---

**Explore my [projects](projects.qmd) or [publications](writing.qmd) to learn more.**
